original_abstract: GP2013 was shown to be physicochemically highly similar to originator rituximab at the level of primary and higher order structure, post-translational modifications and size variants. An extensive functional characterization package indicated that GP2013 has the same biological properties as originator rituximab.
humanized_abstract: GP2013 has been characterised to be highly similar to the originator product (innovator rituximab) in terms of primary and higher order structure, post-translational modifications and size heterogeneity. In addition, an extensive suite of functional release tests was performed confirming the biological activity of GP2013 to be the same as the originator product.

document.output: GP2013 has been characterised to be highly similar to the originator product (innovator rituximab) in terms of primary and higher order structure, post-translational modifications and size heterogeneity. In addition, an extensive suite of functional release tests was performed confirming the biological activity of GP2013 to be the same as the originator product.
